nasb.text: I will send the sword, the famine and the pestilence upon them until they are destroyed from the land which I gave to them and their forefathers.’ ”

esv.text: And I will send sword, famine, and pestilence upon them, until they shall be utterly destroyed from the land that I gave to them and their fathers.”

cnv.text: 我必打發刀劍、饑荒、瘟疫去攻擊他們，直到他們從我賜給他們和他們列祖的土地上都消滅了。’”

ccb.text: 我要使战争、饥荒和瘟疫临到他们，直到他们在我赐给他们和他们祖先的土地上灭亡。’”
